_comment: Phase 5.1 SCP — require MFA for sensitive actions. Denies a set of high-impact actions when aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent is false. Uses BoolIfExists (not Bool): the key is absent in some service-to-service contexts, and BoolIfExists only enforces when the key is present, avoiding breakage. Narrow the action list to genuinely sensitive operations -- a blanket deny-when-no-MFA can lock out automation/roles that legitimately don't carry MFA context.
